# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=svg local="svg" attrs=[]
        element ns=svg local="unknown" attrs=[]
          element ns=svg local="thing" attrs=[]
      element ns=mathml local="math" attrs=[]
        element ns=mathml local="unknown" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
        "after"
